sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74604" key="o)poka/lpason" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπο-κάλπᾰσον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n74604.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Hotai,</tr_> an acrid kind of myrrh, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Balsamodendron Playfairii,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
